commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a `shouldPersist` flag for non-bootstrapOnly external CLI OAuth overlays, fire-and-forget writes fresh CLI credentials back to `auth-profiles.json`, and adds mocked unit coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main logs the external CLI bootstrap DEBUG line and returns a runtime-only overlay when a stored `anthropic:claude-cli` OAuth profile is expired and external credentials are fresh. I did not run a live Claude CLI expiry cycle.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus auth-profile owner/security review; automation cannot supply the external Claude CLI setup proof, and the current diff changes credential write boundaries.

target.title: fix(auth): persist fresh external-cli credential back to local store when stored profile is expired
target.author: hclsys
